clusters.summary: Internship postings fell below 2019 levels with 109 avg applications per posting (273 in tech). 9.7% grad unemployment matches HS diploma holders. 35% of 'entry-level' jobs require 3+ years experience. 43% of grads underemployed.
clusters.student_reaction_summary: Widespread anxiety about post-graduation employment prospects.
clusters.factual_basis_summary: EPI data: 9.7% grad unemployment. Handshake: 109 apps/internship. CNN: tech postings -30%, professional services -42%. NACE: grads with internships 81.6% hired vs 40.7% without.
clusters.possible_content_angle: The 40-Point Gap: Why Your Internship Matters More Than Your GPA in 2026
clusters.why_grouped: All sources cover the same phenomenon: shrinking internship availability, rising competition, and collapsing entry-level job market for 2026 graduates.

clusters.topic: Canvas Data Breach During Finals Week
clusters.summary: ShinyHunters breached Canvas LMS affecting 30M+ users at 8,000+ institutions. Names, emails, student IDs compromised. Finals postponed at multiple schools. Hackers returned data May 11.
clusters.factual_basis_summary: CNN and NPR confirmed: ShinyHunters breached Canvas April 25, detected April 29. Names, emails, student IDs compromised. 8,000+ institutions, 30M+ users. Agreement May 11.
clusters.possible_content_angle: Your Finals Got Cancelled Because Hackers Broke Canvas — Here's What Actually Happened
clusters.why_grouped: Same event covered by two major outlets — the Canvas/Instructure data breach.

clusters.summary: Harvard FAS laying off up to 25% of staff to close $365M structural deficit. McKinsey-developed restructuring plan. Grad admissions halved. Paradox of $57B endowment alongside austerity.
clusters.factual_basis_summary: Harvard Crimson: up to 25% staff layoffs, 3 divisional admin deans eliminated. $365M deficit from endowment tax and deferred maintenance. Grad admissions halved.
clusters.possible_content_angle: $57 Billion Endowment, Still Cutting: What Harvard's Budget Crisis Means for Higher Ed
clusters.why_grouped: Same story from campus and metro perspectives — Harvard FAS budget crisis and layoffs.

clusters.topic: AI Cheating Detection Arms Race on Campus
clusters.summary: Students using AI 'humanizer' tools to bypass detectors. Turnitin claims 98% accuracy but studies show 39.5%. False positives hit non-native speakers hardest. Lawsuits filed over false accusations.
clusters.student_reaction_summary: Students fear false accusations and are turning to humanizer tools as defensive measures.
clusters.factual_basis_summary: NBC: Turnitin 98% claimed vs 39.5% actual accuracy. Non-native English speakers disproportionately flagged. SF Standard: civil rights lawsuit filed over false AI cheating accusation.
clusters.possible_content_angle: The AI Cheating Paradox: Students Using AI to Prove They Didn't Use AI
clusters.why_grouped: Both cover the AI detection reliability crisis and student consequences — one systemic, one legal case.

clusters.topic: International Students Face New Visa Time Limits & OPT Uncertainty
clusters.summary: DHS ending Duration of Status for F/J visas — 4-year max, grace period cut 60→30 days. Effective Sep 2026. Court blocked USCIS pause for 39 countries but students still in limbo.
clusters.factual_basis_summary: ICEF: DHS submitted final rule May 5 ending D/S. 4-year max admission, 30-day grace period. Inside Higher Ed: court blocked pause June 5 but ongoing uncertainty.
clusters.possible_content_angle: 4-Year Countdown: What the New F-1 Visa Rules Mean for Your Study Plan
clusters.why_grouped: Both address the evolving immigration policy landscape for international students — visa duration limits and OPT processing uncertainty.

clusters.topic: Student Loan Defaults Transferred to U.S. Treasury
clusters.summary: Treasury taking over $179B in defaulted student loans from 7.8M borrowers. Defaults jumped $60B+ in one quarter. Treasury's collection arm lost 40% of workforce. 2017 test showed lower resolution rate.
clusters.factual_basis_summary: CRS report: $179B from 7.8M borrowers. Defaults jumped from $117.3B to $179B in Q4 2025. Bureau of Fiscal Service lost 40% of staff. 2017 pilot showed Treasury resolved at lower rate.
clusters.possible_content_angle: Your Student Loans Now Have a New (Tougher) Collector: The U.S. Treasury
clusters.why_grouped: Both cover the same policy: Education Dept transferring defaulted student loan servicing to Treasury.

clusters.topic: All 8 Ivies Now Require SAT/ACT Again
clusters.summary: Columbia last Ivy to end test-optional, requiring SAT/ACT from fall 2027. Faculty review found test scores 'useful indicator.' Princeton reinstated Oct 2025. End of pandemic-era test-optional movement.
clusters.factual_basis_summary: Columbia official: SAT/ACT required from fall 2027 applicants. Faculty review found scores useful. All 8 Ivies now require testing.
clusters.possible_content_angle: Test-Optional Is Dead: All 8 Ivies Now Require SAT/ACT — What Changed?
clusters.why_grouped: Both cover Columbia's announcement ending test-optional policy, completing the Ivy League shift.

clusters.topic: College Loneliness Epidemic: 65% of Students Feel Lonely
clusters.summary: 64.7% of college students report loneliness. Lonely students 4x more likely to have severe psychological distress. 40% considered withdrawing due to emotional stress. LGBQ+ students hit hardest at 70.3%.
clusters.student_reaction_summary: Resonates deeply with students experiencing isolation, especially post-COVID campus culture.
clusters.factual_basis_summary: Inside Higher Ed citing research: 64.7% lonely, 4x distress risk, 40% considered withdrawal, 70.3% LGBQ+ lonely.
clusters.possible_content_angle: 2 Out of 3 College Students Feel Lonely — But Nobody Talks About It
clusters.why_grouped: Single strong source with multiple peer-reviewed data points on student loneliness.

clusters.topic: Student-Run Consulting Firms: The New Campus Side Hustle
clusters.summary: Student consulting firms growing across US campuses. Illinois Business Consulting: 250 students, 22 projects for 19 companies including Fortune 500. Alternative path to consulting experience without traditional recruiting.
clusters.factual_basis_summary: U.S. News: IBC has 250 students across 22 projects for 19 companies in Spring 2026. Largest student-run firm in the country.
clusters.possible_content_angle: Skip the MBB Recruiting Grind: These Student-Run Firms Work With Fortune 500 Clients
clusters.why_grouped: Single authoritative source on emerging campus trend of student-run consulting firms.

excluded_items.reason: Drexel donation is impressive but lacks comparison/comment trigger for general student audience — too school-specific for cardnews
Dorm cost data is strong but better used as supporting evidence within housing/campus life topic rather than standalone cluster
